title: Marketing Analytics
text:
My work in marketing analytics focuses on understanding how data can support better marketing decisions, improve audience engagement, and uncover meaningful business insights. Through graduate coursework and hands-on projects, I’ve worked with campaign data, web analytics, SEO research, and visualization tools to translate complex datasets into clear and actionable findings.
I’m especially interested in the connection between analytics and strategy — not just collecting data, but understanding what it means, why it matters, and how it can improve marketing performance. Many of my projects combine technical analysis with storytelling, helping turn numbers into recommendations that are easier for teams and stakeholders to understand.

title: Marketing Analytics
text:
What You’ll Find

Campaign Performance Analysis: Analyzing engagement, traffic, and conversion metrics to evaluate marketing effectiveness.
Data Visualization & Dashboards: Building reports and dashboards using R, Quarto, Tableau, and interactive visualization tools.
SEO & Web Analytics: Exploring user behavior, website performance, and local search visibility through analytics platforms and search data.
Marketing Research & Insights: Applying statistical analysis and consumer research methods to support strategic decision making.
Attribution & Channel Analysis: Evaluating how different marketing channels contribute to customer actions and business outcomes.


Throughout these projects, I’ve worked with tools such as R, BigQuery, GA4, Quarto, Tableau, and SQL to analyze data, create visual reports, and communicate insights in a way that is both practical and easy to understand.

title: Digital Marketing
text: Below are selected projects that reflect my experience in digital marketing strategy, campaign analysis, SEO research, and data-driven decision making. These projects combine creative marketing ideas with analytics tools to better understand customer behavior, improve engagement, and support business goals.

title: Digital Marketing
section: ODI Grips AI Caption Strategy Project
text:
ODI Grips AI Caption Strategy Project
For this graduate research project, I analyzed how AI-generated social media captions performed under different prompting strategies. Using historical Instagram data from ODI Grips, I evaluated how structured prompts influenced caption quality, engagement potential, and brand alignment.
The project combined marketing strategy with analytics by comparing caption performance patterns, testing audience engagement metrics, and presenting findings through visual reports and statistical analysis.
Skills Demonstrated:

Content Strategy: Evaluated caption structure, tone, and audience engagement.
Marketing Analytics: Analyzed Instagram performance metrics using R.
Consumer Engagement Research: Studied how prompt structure influenced perceived quality.
Data Visualization: Built visual reports and presentation-ready findings in Quarto.

title: Digital Marketing
text:
Odoo Website Analytics & Attribution Analysis
As part of a team analytics project, I worked on analyzing website traffic behavior and attribution performance using GA4, BigQuery, and R. The goal was to better understand how users interacted with the website and which channels contributed most to conversions.
I helped develop dashboards, attribution comparisons, and executive-style presentations that translated technical findings into actionable marketing recommendations.
Skills Demonstrated:

Web Analytics: Analyzed traffic, sessions, and conversion behavior.
Attribution Modeling: Compared last-touch and channel contribution patterns.
Dashboard Development: Created interactive visualizations and reports.
Strategic Insights: Connected analytics findings to marketing recommendations.

Below is an embedded demonstration of the interactive report:

title: Strategic Marketing
text:
SEO & Local Search Optimization Research
This project focused on improving local visibility and search performance for a law firm brand through SEO strategy and Google Business Profile optimization. I researched keyword positioning, local search visibility, and brand consistency across digital platforms.
The project also explored how branding decisions, localized content, and search optimization strategies influence discoverability and audience trust.
Skills Demonstrated:

SEO Strategy: Evaluated keyword usage and local search performance.
Brand Positioning: Improved consistency across digital touchpoints.
Competitive Analysis: Compared visibility against competing firms.
Content Planning: Developed SEO-focused marketing recommendations.

title: Digital Marketing
text:
Marketing Dashboard & Reporting Projects
Throughout my graduate coursework, I created multiple dashboards and marketing reports designed for executive audiences. These projects focused on translating complex datasets into clear business insights using R, Quarto, Tableau, and visualization tools.
I emphasized clean reporting design, storytelling through data, and actionable recommendations rather than simply presenting numbers.
Skills Demonstrated:

Marketing Reporting: Developed stakeholder-focused reports and presentations.
Data Storytelling: Simplified technical findings into business insights.
Visualization Design: Built clean and interactive dashboards.
Strategic Communication: Presented findings in an executive-friendly format.

title: Campaign Insights Dashboard
text:
Overview
This project involved building a dashboard to track and visualize marketing campaign performance. Metrics like click-through rate, conversion rate, and ROI were tracked across channels using R and Tableau.




Learning Outcomes

Visualize and monitor key marketing metrics.

Analyze performance trends across multiple campaigns.

Identify high- and low-performing segments.

Communicate insights through interactive visuals.

Develop data-informed recommendations.




Key Skills Gained

Dashboard development

Campaign analytics

Data wrangling in R

Tableau or R Shiny visualization

Performance measurement

title: Marketing Funnel Attribution Model
text:
Overview
This project developed a marketing attribution model to assign credit to touchpoints throughout the conversion journey. The insights supported channel optimization and budget reallocation.




Learning Outcomes

Track multi-touch customer journeys.

Model attribution using first-touch, last-touch, and linear approaches.

Visualize funnel performance.

Quantify channel impact on conversion.

Guide future campaign investment decisions.




Key Skills Gained

Attribution modeling

Funnel analysis

Data visualization

Campaign performance analysis

R or Python analytics pipelines

title: SEO Benchmarking Analysis
text:
Overview
This project compared SEO performance across competitors, highlighting keyword gaps, backlink profiles, and content effectiveness. Insights were used to guide an improved content and SEO strategy.




Learning Outcomes

Identify keyword opportunities through competitive research.

Track and compare domain authority and page rankings.

Recommend on-page SEO improvements.

Design a data-driven SEO content strategy.

Visualize competitor positioning.




Key Skills Gained

Keyword research

Web scraping & data cleaning

SEO analysis tools

Data storytelling

Strategy development

title: Customer Segmentation Using Clustering
text:
Overview
In this analysis, customer data was segmented using clustering algorithms to identify meaningful groups. These segments informed targeting strategies and personalization efforts.




Learning Outcomes

Clean and prepare customer-level data.

Apply clustering techniques to group similar customers.

Interpret clusters to define marketing personas.

Recommend tailored messaging strategies.

Support targeted campaign development.




Key Skills Gained

K-means clustering

Data preprocessing

Customer profiling

Market segmentation strategy

R or Python for machine learning
